title: Should We Ship It as a Research Preview?
description: Pitching the research-preview launch strategy to a cautious manager. Half-formal, half-casual.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We're not ready for a full launch. Should we just delay?

templates.text: What if we ship it as a research preview instead?
templates.hint_zh: 我們改成 research preview 出貨怎麼樣?

templates.text: We label it as experimental and warn users it might change or be removed.
templates.hint_zh: 我們標示它是實驗性質,提醒用戶可能變更或下架。

templates.text: It lowers the commitment. We can iterate weekly instead of polishing for months.
templates.hint_zh: 降低承諾的壓力。我們可以每週迭代,不用打磨好幾個月。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Won't users complain when we change things?

templates.text: If we're upfront about it, expectations match. Anthropic ships almost everything this way.
templates.hint_zh: 只要我們事前說清楚,期待就會對齊。Anthropic 幾乎所有東西都這樣出。

templates.text: Free or beta-tier only, no SLA promise. We graduate it once metrics stabilize.
templates.hint_zh: 免費或 beta 級,先不承諾 SLA。等指標穩定再升正式版。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, draft a one-page proposal and we'll bring it to leadership.

templates.text: On it. I'll have something by Friday.
